messages.content:
Hi everyone,

Mathematics Distillation Challenge - Equational Theories: Stage 2 is now open for pre-registration, and registration is open to everyone:
https://competition.sair.foundation/competitions/mathematics-distillation-challenge-equational-theories-stage2/overview

You can now register and create/join teams for Stage 2. As in Stage 1, each team can have 1-5 members. The Stage 2 competition will officially begin on May 1, when the submission pipeline, Playground, and Contributor Network for Stage 2 will go live.

Stage 1 evaluation is currently in progress, and the Stage 1 leaderboard will be released before April 30. The Stage 1 results will provide useful references for Stage 2.
messages.subject: Stage 2 pre-registration

messages.content: Will the submitted stage 1 team sheets be openly displayed alongside the results or do the sheets remain private alongside the results?
messages.subject: Stage 2 pre-registration

messages.content: Yes, the Stage 1 submitted cheatsheets will be made open alongside the results, so everyone can use the good Stage 1 cheatsheets as references for Stage 2.
messages.subject: Stage 2 pre-registration

messages.content:
I'm assuming further information will be available for stage 2?

https://competition.sair.foundation/competitions/mathematics-distillation-challenge-equational-theories-stage2/overview

Will stage 2 remain at 10kbs maximum size? Will more ai be added to the stage 2 exam? Will there be a date when all this is decided?
messages.subject: Stage 2 pre-registration

messages.content: Details will be released when it's officially launched. Currently just register and create your team.
messages.subject: Stage 2 pre-registration
